info.name: GraphQL – S3 Module
info.description: S3: s3Files, s3FileData, s3FileInfo, s3FileDownloadUrl, s3FileSchema, s3FileStats, s3BucketMetadata; initiateCsvUpload, completeCsvUpload, deleteFile. Variables: use camelCase (fileKey, uploadId for completeCsvUpload). Use upload.presignedUrl and upload.registerPart between initiate and complete. See sql/apis/07_S3_MODULE.md (Queries and mutations – parameters and variable types).

body.raw: {"query":"query ListS3Files($prefix: String) { s3 { s3Files(prefix: $prefix) { files { key filename size lastModified contentType } total bucketDisplayName } } }","variables":{"prefix":"upload/"}

{"query":"query GetS3FileData($fileKey: String!, $limit: Int!, $offset: Int) { s3 { s3FileData(fileKey: $fileKey, limit: $limit, offset: $offset) { fileKey rows { data } limit offset totalRows } } }","variables":{"fileKey":"{{fileKey}}","limit":100,"offset":0}
{"query":"query GetS3FileInfo($fileKey: String!) { s3 { s3FileInfo(fileKey: $fileKey) { key filename size lastModified contentType } } }","variables":{"fileKey":"{{fileKey}}"}

{"query":"query GetS3FileDownloadUrl($fileKey: String!, $expiresIn: Int) { s3 { s3FileDownloadUrl(fileKey: $fileKey, expiresIn: $expiresIn) { downloadUrl expiresIn } } }","variables":{"fileKey":"{{fileKey}}","expiresIn":3600}

{"query":"mutation InitiateCsvUpload($input: InitiateCsvUploadInput!) { s3 { initiateCsvUpload(input: $input) { uploadId fileKey chunkSize numParts } } }","variables":{"input":{"filename":"contacts.csv","fileSize":1048576}}

body: query":"mutation CompleteCsvUpload($input: CompleteUploadInput!) { s3 { completeCsvUpload(input: $input) { status fileKey s3Url location } } }","variables":{"input":{"uploadId":"{{uploadId}}"}}
